title: Rig Veda 10.14: Hymn to Yama, Lord of the Dead
description: The oldest Vedic hymn on death and the afterlife: Yama, the first mortal who died, now rules the realm of the ancestors.
introduction: The oldest Vedic hymn on death and the afterlife: Yama, the first mortal who died, now rules the realm of the ancestors.

translation.original_text: paraṃ mr̥tyo anu parehi pánthāṃ yás te svá itaro devayā́nāt
translation.text: Go forth, O Death, by your own path, which is different from the path of the gods.
